data.body:
## Description

Replace the content of the 3 old skill SKILL.md files with redirect stubs pointing to /dso:onboarding. Keep frontmatter valid.

### Files to modify:
- plugins/dso/skills/project-setup/SKILL.md → redirect to /dso:onboarding
- plugins/dso/skills/dev-onboarding/SKILL.md → redirect to /dso:architect-foundation
- plugins/dso/skills/design-onboarding/SKILL.md → redirect to /dso:onboarding

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/skills/test-redirect-stubs.sh exits 0
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-redirect-stubs.sh
- [ ] Old skills contain redirect messages
  Verify: grep -q 'onboarding' plugins/dso/skills/project-setup/SKILL.md
